overview.description: The iShares Large Cap 10% Target Buffer Sep ETF (STEN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund seeks to track the price return of the iShares Core S&P 500 ETF (IVV) up to a cap, with a 10% downside hedge over a one-year period. The actively managed fund obtains exposure by holding IVV shares and options. STEN was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
